seo.title: 100 SaaS Applications resources for developers
seo.description: A curated set of practical SaaS Applications resources for engineers.

content.intro: Building a modern SaaS requires balancing rapid feature delivery with robust infrastructure for billing, multi-tenancy, and operational observability. This resource article provides a curated list of tools and implementation patterns focused on the Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe ecosystem to help developers ship and scale efficiently.

items.title: Stripe Billing and Subscriptions
items.description: The industry standard for recurring revenue. Use Stripe Checkout for pre-built UI and the 'Customer Portal' for self-service subscription management.

items.title: Lemon Squeezy
items.description: A Merchant of Record (MoR) that handles global sales tax and VAT compliance automatically, simplifying international SaaS sales.

items.title: Stripe Webhook Handler Pattern
items.description: Implement a robust webhook listener using the 'stripe-node' library to handle events like 'invoice.paid' and 'customer.subscription.deleted' with idempotency checks.

items.title: Lago Open-Source Metering
items.description: An open-source alternative to Stripe Billing for complex usage-based pricing models that require high-volume event ingestion.

items.title: Polar.sh
items.description: A monetization platform specifically for open-source developers to sell subscriptions or access to private GitHub repositories.

items.title: Paddle Billing
items.description: Another Merchant of Record that provides unified checkout, subscription management, and tax handling globally.

items.title: Stripe Tax API
items.description: Programmatic tax calculation for custom checkout flows, ensuring you collect the correct sales tax based on the user's jurisdiction.

items.title: Tier.run
items.description: A pricing-as-code solution that allows you to define pricing plans in a JSON/YAML file and sync them to Stripe automatically.

items.title: RevenueCat
items.description: Essential for SaaS apps with mobile components to manage cross-platform subscriptions and sync Apple/Google IAP state to the web.

items.title: Orb Usage-Based Billing
items.description: High-scale billing infrastructure designed specifically for companies moving to complex, hybrid usage-based pricing models.

items.title: Clerk Organizations
items.description: Pre-built components and API for team management, allowing users to create, join, and switch between multiple SaaS accounts seamlessly.

items.title: Supabase Row Level Security (RLS)
items.description: Implement multi-tenancy at the database layer by ensuring users can only access data where 'tenant_id' matches their session context.

items.title: WorkOS Enterprise SSO
items.description: The fastest way to add SAML and SCIM support for B2B SaaS customers who require integration with Okta or Azure AD.

items.title: Auth.js (NextAuth) Credentials Provider
items.description: A flexible framework for self-hosting authentication logic with support for various database adapters like Prisma and Drizzle.

items.title: Kinde Auth & Feature Flags
items.description: Combines user authentication with built-in feature flagging to control access to specific SaaS tiers based on user roles.

items.title: Zitadel Identity Management
items.description: An open-source alternative to Auth0 that focuses on multi-tenancy and high security standards for enterprise-ready SaaS.

items.title: PropelAuth
items.description: B2B-specific authentication that handles organization management and invites out of the box, reducing custom code for team logic.

items.title: Casl.js Authorization
items.description: Define permissions in a central location (e.g., 'can edit post') and share them between your frontend and backend logic.

items.title: Iron Session
items.description: A lightweight, stateless session utility for Next.js that uses encrypted cookies to store user data without a server-side session store.

items.title: Database Schema-per-Tenant Pattern
items.description: Advanced isolation technique using separate Postgres schemas for each customer, suitable for high-security or regulated industries.

items.title: PostHog Product Analytics
items.description: An all-in-one suite for session recording, heatmaps, and feature flags to understand how users interact with your SaaS.

items.title: Helicone LLM Observability
items.description: An LLM proxy that provides caching, rate limiting, and cost tracking for OpenAI and Anthropic API calls to prevent budget overruns.

items.title: Resend Transactional Email
items.description: A developer-first email API for sending welcome emails, password resets, and notifications with a clean React-based template engine.

items.title: Sentry Error Monitoring
items.description: Real-time error tracking that includes stack traces and breadcrumbs, essential for maintaining SaaS uptime and reliability.

items.title: Upstash Redis for Rate Limiting
items.description: Use serverless Redis to implement API rate limiting per user or per tenant to protect your infrastructure from abuse.

items.title: Inngest Background Jobs
items.description: A serverless queue and workflow engine that allows you to handle long-running tasks like CSV exports or AI processing without timeouts.

items.title: Loops.so SaaS Email Marketing
items.description: An email platform built for SaaS that triggers automated onboarding sequences based on user events from your app.

items.title: Svix Webhook Proxy
items.description: A service that helps you send webhooks to your own customers, handling retries and security signatures automatically.

items.title: LiteLLM Proxy
items.description: A unified interface to call 100+ LLMs using the OpenAI format, allowing you to swap providers easily to reduce costs.

items.title: Axiom Logging
items.description: High-performance log management for Vercel and serverless environments, providing instant insights into system behavior.

pro_tips: Always implement idempotency keys for Stripe webhook handlers to prevent processing the same payment event multiple times during network retries.
Use Supabase Row Level Security (RLS) as a secondary defense layer for multi-tenancy, even if you have application-level checks.
Set hard monthly spending limits on your OpenAI/Anthropic API keys to prevent 'infinite loop' bugs from draining your bank account.
Decouple feature access from your code using feature flags (e.g., PostHog or LaunchDarkly) so you can toggle premium features without a re-deploy.
Use a Merchant of Record like Lemon Squeezy or Paddle if you are an indie developer to avoid the massive complexity of global VAT/GST compliance.
